_comment: Operator NAME PATTERNS matched as WHOLE WORDS (case-insensitive) against the FAA registry's registered-owner NAME field by fetch-faa-seeders.js, MERGED with the built-in list in seeders.js. IMPORTANT: use precise multi-word names. A bare single word like 'SOAR' or 'RAINMAKER' matches unrelated companies (soaring/gliding clubs, a law-marketing firm) — the real operators are 'SEEDING OPERATIONS (AND ATMOSPHERIC RESEARCH)' and 'RAINMAKER TECHNOLOGY'. RAILWAY NOTE: if your volume is mounted at /app/data, it SHADOWS this committed file at runtime, so the built-in list in seeders.js is the reliable place to edit patterns; this file is still used on non-volume hosts and by a local importer run. Add operators named in NOAA weather-modification activity reports (15 U.S.C. 330). 'pinnedAircraft' hard-adds specific airframes by icao24 (preferred) or registration (N-number).
